patches.content:
Index: 
===================================================================

+++ 
@@ -26,16 +26,8 @@
       hasPermission: hasPermission,
       fieldConfigs: Chamado.fieldConfigs,
       idFieldName: 'id',
       dateFieldName: 'createdAt',
-      customActions: [
-        CustomAction(
-          icon: Icons.update,
-          label: 'Alterar Status',
-          onPressed: (context, object) => _showStatusDialog(context, object),
-          isVisible: (object) => object.status != 'FECHADO',
-        ),
-      ],
       exportConfig: const ExportConfig(
         enableCsvExport: true,
         filenamePrefix: 'chamados',
       ),
@@ -46,14 +38,5 @@
       enableSearch: true,
       enableColumnReorder: true,
     );
   }
-
-  void _showStatusDialog(BuildContext context, Chamado chamado) {
-    showDialog(
-      context: context,
-      builder: (BuildContext context) {
-        return StatusChamadoDialog(chamado: chamado);
-      },
-    );
-  }
 }
